title: Quick Frame Connector Check
description: Used to check the connectors for Quick Frame Designs

F_downward.description: Main Rail to Joist/Beam, downward reaction force. Symbol: R_{downward}. Units: lb. Result from Structural Analysis, the worst case downward force on  the Main Rail - Joist connector.

F_upward.description: Main Rail to Joist/Beam, upwards reaction force. Symbol: R_{upward}. Units: lb. Result from Structural Analysis, the worst case uplift force on the Main Rail - Joist connector. Zero means there is no load combination producing an uplift on the end connector

V_y.description: Cross Rail to Main Rail Load. Units: lb. Worst case load on the Cross Rail to Main Rail, in either direction

bolt_shear.description: Shearing Force on Bolt. Symbol: V_{bolt}. Units: lb. Worst case shearing force on all bolts

max_utility.description: Max Allowable Utility. Symbol: UR_{max}. Max allowable utility ratio. If the utility is greater than this number, the next (heavier) connector is selected and tested

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
